value.found_quote: Managed Agents API on Agent Platform (Managed code): A config-driven, REST-first API for building autonomous agents inside a fully managed sandbox environment for actions.
value.rationale: The page describes the offering: it covers building, deploying, and managing AI agents on the Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform, including a "Managed Agents API on Agent Platform" and a "fully managed runtime," matching the claim's described overview text. The page header explicitly states "Preview. This feature is subject to the 'Pre-GA Offerings Terms'," indicating preview lifecycle status.
